description: Control Indicator: does Parent control Offspring
notes: See code list CTRL_IND; when REG_IND=1 control = legal authority (>=25% voting securities, majority-of-directors, or controlling influence per Reg Y 225.2(e)/12 CFR 574); when REG_IND=2 by ownership % or FRS determination

description: DB2 DATETIME form of DT_END
notes: Must be quoted in queries

description: DB2 form of date relationship established
DB2 DATETIME form of DT_START
notes: Primary-key component

description: Date End (YYYYMMDD)
notes: 99991231 = non-terminated; current relationships filtered by DT_END=99991231

description: Date Relationship Established (YYYYMMDD)
notes: Equals initial-row Date Start except where relationship predates regulation (pre-1956/1970 BHCs, pre-1978 FBOs, pre-existing entities)

description: Date Start (YYYYMMDD): effective date relationship became regulated/known
notes: For indirect relationships = when Offspring became controlled by the BHC/FBO; primary-key component

description: Equity Indicator: form of ownership/control by direct holder
notes: See code list EQUITY_IND (0/1/2)

description: Financial Consolidation Indicator: is the company consolidated in reporter's financials
notes: See code list FC_IND (0/1/2)

description: RSSD ID of Offspring: entity owned/controlled by Parent
notes: Primary-key component; joins to Attributes ID_RSSD

description: RSSD ID of Parent: entity that owns/controls Offspring
notes: Direct: owns/controls, common director/officer/employee, or top-tier BHC/FBO per FR Y-10; indirect: top-tier BHC/FBO or intervening BHC; primary-key component; joins to Attributes ID_RSSD

description: Merchant Banking / Insurance Company Investment: $ amount (millions) of FHC investments
notes: Under BHC 4(k)(4)(H) merchant-bank authority or 4(k)(4)(I) insurance; not valid before 2001-09-01

description: Other Basis for Relationship Indicator
notes: See code list OTHER_BASIS_IND

description: Percent of Equity Voting Control: Parent's % ownership/control of Offspring
notes: Exact for BHC/bank/FBO direct holders; lower-range value for non-banking / Reg K subpart A or C; 0 = N/A

description: Percent Equity Bracket derived from PCT_EQUITY
notes: See code list PCT_EQUITY_BRACKET

description: Percent Equity Format derived from EQUITY_IND
notes: See code list PCT_EQUITY_FORMAT (Other/Exact/Bracket)

description: Percent of Other Voting Control: Parent's % when basis is non-voting or merchant-banking/insurance investment
notes: Offspring must be BHC/bank/FBO or merchant-bank investment; 0 = N/A

description: Reason for Creation of the Relationship
notes: See code list REASON_ROW_CRTD

description: Reason for Termination of the Relationship
notes: See code list REASON_TERM_RELN

description: Regulated Indicator: relationship governed by banking statutes
notes: See code list REG_IND (1=Regulated / 2=Unregulated)

description: Regulation K Subpart A Investment in a non-banking company
notes: See code list REGK_INV; not valid before 2004-06-01

description: Relationship Level
notes: See code list RELN_LVL (1=Direct, 2=Indirect, 3=2G3, 4=DPC); primary-key component
